mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT id, username, name, avatar, phone, email, COALESCE(admin_no, '') AS userNo, '' AS className, '' AS branch, 'APPROVED' AS status, 'ADMIN' AS source, `level` FROM admin UNION ALL SELECT id, username, name, avatar, phone, email, COALESCE(examiner_no, '') AS userNo, '' AS className, '' AS branch, 'APPROVED' AS status, 'EXAMINER' AS source, NULL AS level FROM examiner UNION ALL SELECT id, username, name, avatar, phone, email, COALESCE(student_no, '') AS userNo, COALESCE(class_name, '') AS className, COALESCE(branch, '') AS branch, COALESCE(status, 'APPROVED') AS status, 'STUDENT' AS source, NULL AS level FROM student ) t ORDER BY CASE WHEN userNo IS NULL OR userNo = '' THEN 999999 ELSE CAST(userNo AS UNSIGNED) END ASC
